title: Dinner with Classmates 同学聚餐
scene: Tom和几个同学放学后一起去吃饭。

lines.en: School is over! Are you hungry, Jack?
Very hungry! Let us go eat something.
lines.zh: 好饿！我们去吃点东西吧。

lines.en: Do you want to try the new noodle shop?
lines.zh: 你想试试那家新开的面馆吗？

lines.en: Sure. I heard their noodles are really good.
lines.zh: 好啊。听说他们的面条很好吃。

lines.en: Let us ask Lily and Ann to come too.
lines.zh: 我们叫莉莉和安也一起来吧。

lines.en: Great idea! The more the better!
I will pay this time. You can pay next time.
Thank you, Tom. You are so kind!
What kind of noodles do you like?
